full_text:
Sun Jiao (Shulang) 孫皎 (叔朗)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Jiao (孫皎), styledShulang (叔朗), was born in Wu. Held off Cao Cao’s forces at Ruxukou. A generous and honourable man. Sun Jiao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Jiao lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
